description: You are the lead developer for a recreational basketball league management system. The league commissioner has reported critical bugs in the statistics engine located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/league_builder`. Fix the issues in `league/stats_engine.py` where player stats are mirrored between new players, standings tie-breaking incorrectly skips head-to-head records in favor of point differential, and winning streaks fail to reset after losses. Ensure all tests pass without modifying the test files.
